monster.name: AxelRuby
monster.description: A massive man, arms covered in arena scars. Square jaw, nose broken multiple times, small calculating eyes that betray an intelligence his physique doesn't suggest. He wears a studded leather vest over a worn shirt and a rough ruby hanging from his neck — the gang's symbol. He speaks little and in a low voice, forcing his interlocutors to lean in. When he laughs, it's a short, unpleasant sound. He has a habit of cracking his knuckles before making a decision. Distinctive trait: brutal and cunning in equal measure. He's not the stupid brute he appears to be — he's a seasoned smuggler who learned to survive in the arena and on the streets.
